name: preliminary-dispatch-suppressed-by-hold
rationale: Complete document set AND major broker-vs-doc discrepancy (>30%). F2.DH discrepancyHold ACTIVATES; F2.PD preliminary-all-docs-in dispatch is SUPPRESSED despite complete docs. Tests R10-F symmetric-gate restoration: prelim dispatch should not fire when discrepancyHold is active.
notes: Two-event sequence with major discrepancy. Pair with B01 (which tests F2.DH activation in isolation) and B04 (which tests F2.PD positive path) — B05 is the interaction test.
